title: Potential speakers
excerpt: I wanted to reach out to inform you that Gabe Belanger from Computer Geeks on Call will be hosting a live video discussion this Thursday, March 14th at 1pm EST Toronto time. Gabe will be focusing on team productivity and…

posts.author: Beatriz (Osorio )
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to reach out to inform you that Gabe Belanger from Computer Geeks on Call will be hosting a live video discussion this Thursday, March 14th at 1pm EST Toronto time. Gabe will be focusing on team productivity and will specifically delve into the functionalities of Monday.com for basic admin tasks.

We’re reaching out to potential speakers to enrich the discussion, and I immediately thought of you given your expertise with Monday.com. We’d love to have you join us as a speaker to share your experiences with using Monday.com, and perhaps discuss topics such as AI or complicated automation in relation to team productivity.

The conversation will be brief, lasting no more than 20 minutes, and we believe your insights would greatly contribute to helping businesses grow by sharing practical experiences.

If you’re interested in participating, please send me your email address so we can extend a formal invitation.

Looking forward to your response!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing Osorio! We hope it was a successful live discussion

posts.author: Beatriz (Osorio )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I would love to have you in the future to share tips and quick guide on how to help more people to use Monday.com. If you can send me your information like your email I will appreciate the privilege to talk to you.
